Interface MarketObserver

All Known Implementing Classes:
ServerVirtualView
public interface MarketObserver
Observer interface for market-level state changes in Mesos. Implemented by ServerVirtualView to forward market events (card draws, row refreshes) to all connected clients.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    eventSolved(int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType)
    Called when an event card is resolved and removed from the market.
    void
    onCardRemovedFromBottom(int position, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Called when a card is removed from the bottom market row.
    void
    onCardRemovedFromTop(int position, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Called when a card is removed from the top market row.
    void
    onExtraDrawSnapshotReady(List<Card> snapshotCards, List<BuildingCard> snapshotBuildings)
    Called just before the end-of-round market refresh, carrying the exact cards that were available at the close of the round.
    void
    onMarketChanged(List<Card> topCards, List<Card> bottomCards, List<BuildingCard> topBuildings, List<BuildingCard> bottomBuildings)
    Called once at game start to push the full initial market state to the observer.
    void
    onTopBuildingRefreshed(List<BuildingCard> topCards)
    Called when the top building row is refreshed.
    void
    onTopCardRefreshed(List<Card> topCards)
    Called when the top card row is refreshed (old top becomes new bottom, new top is dealt).

  • Method Details

    • onMarketChanged

      void onMarketChanged(List<Card> topCards, List<Card> bottomCards, List<BuildingCard> topBuildings, List<BuildingCard> bottomBuildings)
      Called once at game start to push the full initial market state to the observer.
      Parameters:
      topCards - the initial top card row.
      bottomCards - the initial bottom card row.
      topBuildings - the initial top building row.
      bottomBuildings - the initial bottom building row.

    • onTopCardRefreshed

      void onTopCardRefreshed(List<Card> topCards)
      Called when the top card row is refreshed (old top becomes new bottom, new top is dealt).
      Parameters:
      topCards - the new top card row.

    • onTopBuildingRefreshed

      void onTopBuildingRefreshed(List<BuildingCard> topCards)
      Called when the top building row is refreshed.
      Parameters:
      topCards - the new top building row.

    • eventSolved

      void eventSolved(int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType)
      Called when an event card is resolved and removed from the market.
      Parameters:
      eventID - the unique identifier of the resolved event.
      eventType - the category of the resolved event.

    • onCardRemovedFromTop

      void onCardRemovedFromTop(int position, CARD_TYPE cardType)
      Called when a card is removed from the top market row.
      Parameters:
      position - zero-based index of the removed card.
      cardType - the type of card that was removed.

    • onCardRemovedFromBottom

      void onCardRemovedFromBottom(int position, CARD_TYPE cardType)
      Called when a card is removed from the bottom market row.
      Parameters:
      position - zero-based index of the removed card.
      cardType - the type of card that was removed.

    • onExtraDrawSnapshotReady

      void onExtraDrawSnapshotReady(List<Card> snapshotCards, List<BuildingCard> snapshotBuildings)
      Called just before the end-of-round market refresh, carrying the exact cards that were available at the close of the round. Used by the draw-one-more mechanic so the server and client both operate on the pre-refresh market state.
      Parameters:
      snapshotCards - the top card row at end of round.
      snapshotBuildings - the top building row at end of round.
